diagrams.title: Binary Decision Tree for Subset Sum
diagrams.description: Tree showing all 2^n subsets for n=3 items. Root = empty, each branch = include/exclude item, leaves = complete subsets
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how exhaustive search explores exponential search space for subset problems

diagrams.title: Bubble Sort Pass Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how largest elements bubble to the end in each pass through comparison and swapping of adjacent elements
elements: Pass 1: Compare pairs, swap if needed → largest at end
Pass 2: Compare pairs (except last), swap → 2nd largest at position n-1
diagrams.purpose: Understand O(n²) complexity through visual pass-by-pass comparison

diagrams.title: Permutation Generation Tree
diagrams.description: Tree showing decision process for generating all permutations of [1,2,3]. Each level fixes one position
diagrams.purpose: Visualize n! growth and recursive generation process
